name: Koch Industries
tie_statement: Company with documented financial and political ties to Trump administration officials.
explanation: Koch Industries and subsidiaries have supported conservative causes. Georgia-Pacific owns Angel Soft, Dixie, Brawny, and Quilted Northern paper products.
alternative: Seventh Generation, Who Gives A Crap, or Bamboo-based paper products

name: Procter & Gamble
tie_statement: Major corporation with documented political contributions to Trump-aligned PACs.
explanation: P&G owns household brands including Charmin toilet paper, Bounty paper towels, and Tide detergent.
alternative: Method cleaning products, Tom's of Maine, or local/organic alternatives

name: MyPillow
tie_statement: Brand led by prominent Trump supporter and advisor Mike Lindell.
explanation: Founder Mike Lindell was a close Trump ally, funding election denial efforts and appearing as a public surrogate.
alternative: Avocado Green Pillow, Purple Pillow, or other eco-friendly bedding brands

name: Goya Foods
tie_statement: CEO publicly praised Trump at White House event in 2020.
explanation: CEO Robert Unanue praised Donald Trump at the White House, leading to widespread boycotts in Latino communities.
alternative: La Preferida, Iberia, Mahatma Rice, or other Latino-owned food brands

name: Trump Organization
tie_statement: Directly owned by Donald Trump and his family.
explanation: The Trump Organization encompasses hotels, golf courses, and other properties directly owned by Donald Trump.
alternative: Hyatt, Marriott, Hilton, or locally-owned hotels

name: Chick-fil-A
tie_statement: Corporate leadership and foundation donations aligned with Trump-supporting conservative causes.
explanation: Chick-fil-A executives and foundation historically supported anti-LGBTQ organizations connected to Trump allies.
alternative: Popeyes, KFC, or local chicken restaurants

name: Hobby Lobby
tie_statement: Owners are major Trump donors and conservative cause supporters.
explanation: The Green family, owners of Hobby Lobby, have been significant contributors to Trump campaigns and conservative PACs.
alternative: Michaels, Joann Fabrics, or local craft stores

name: New Balance
tie_statement: Company executives initially expressed support for Trump's trade policies.
explanation: New Balance leadership made statements supporting Trump's stance on trade deals.
alternative: Adidas, Nike, Allbirds, or other athletic shoe brands

name: Tesla
tie_statement: CEO Elon Musk became a major Trump supporter and advisor.
explanation: Elon Musk endorsed Trump and became heavily involved in supporting his 2024 campaign.
alternative: Ford Lightning, Chevrolet Bolt, BMW i-series, or other electric vehicles

name: Home Depot
tie_statement: Founders and executives have been major Trump campaign contributors.
explanation: Home Depot co-founder Bernie Marcus was a significant Trump supporter and donor.
alternative: Lowe's, Menards, or local hardware stores
